reviews.comment:
es exelente la atención del personal tanto de la tienda Full, como de los playeros.
Es una vergüenza, que el ACA, le permita al consecionario tener tan poco personal y que la cola para cargar combustible sea interminable.
es bochornoso

(Translated by Google)
The service from the staff at both the Full store and the gas station attendants is excellent.

It's a disgrace that the ACA allows the dealership to have so few staff and that the line to fill up is endless.
It's shameful.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos que hayas tenido esta experiencia, trabajamos para mejorar los servicios. Saludos
